updated_for: RAG Trace UI + Visual Query Debugger

default_skills.name: elsevier-citation
default_skills.description: Audit Elsevier citations, reference integrity, missing related work, and bibliography consistency without fabricating sources.

default_skills.name: elsevier-figure-table
default_skills.description: Audit and improve Elsevier figures, tables, captions, result reporting, and visual consistency using compact component fragments.

default_skills.name: elsevier-highlights
default_skills.description: Create and audit Elsevier Highlights, graphical-abstract briefs, and short submission assets with Guide-for-Authors verification reminders.

default_skills.name: elsevier-paper-miner
default_skills.description: Mine the lawful template-paper corpus for section structure, figure/table/caption patterns, and reviewer-risk lessons without copying protected text.

default_skills.name: elsevier-response
default_skills.description: Prepare Elsevier reviewer-response letters, revision matrices, rebuttal plans, and change summaries with source-grounded compliance checks.

default_skills.name: elsevier-reviewer
default_skills.description: Simulate Elsevier journal reviewers and identify novelty, evidence, experiment, formatting, and integrity risks with compact module routing.

default_skills.name: elsevier-skill-suite
default_skills.description: Context-safe Elsevier journal manuscript skill-suite with routing for writing, review, response, figure/table, highlights, citation, submission, official-source checks, and paper-template mining.

default_skills.name: elsevier-submission
default_skills.description: Prepare Elsevier submission-package checklists, cover letters, declarations, rights/license checks, and final-file reminders with live verification warnings.

default_skills.name: elsevier-writing
default_skills.description: Draft, rewrite, and audit Elsevier journal manuscripts via compact suite fragments for journals, components, evidence, structure, and official-source checks.
